languageSwitcher.label: Language
languageSwitcher.ariaLabel: Change the language of the site

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Activity of your organization.
overview.notConfiguredBody: Your organization has not yet been created. Contact support or re-register.

embed.title: Widget integrated into your site
embed.hint: Script pasted in the layout · excluding Facebook / Instagram tracked links
embed.desc: Chatbot statistics displayed on your website after installing the embed code.
embed.noActivity: No embed activity at the moment. Check that the widget script is installed on your site (Integration tab).
embed.noActivityTab: No activity yet. Install the widget script (Integration tab) and check back here.

trackedLinks.title: Performance of tracked links
trackedLinks.desc: For each link created (Facebook, Instagram, etc.), see who opened the chat and where they clicked (WhatsApp, session, registration, etc.).
trackedLinks.empty: No tracked links. Create a Facebook or Instagram link in Tracked Links then share the URL on your networks.
trackedLinks.noInteraction: No interaction yet (WhatsApp, session, etc.) on this link.

country.title: Distribution by country
country.desc: Countries detected when opening the tracked link or when qualifying in the chat.
country.empty: No country data at the moment. Countries appear when the assistant qualifies a visitor (question about country of origin).

quickDeploy.title: Rapid deployment — {name}
quickDeploy.hint: Paste this script before the </body> tag of your site:

sites.title: Sites
sites.subtitle: Your sites and widget keys for integration.
sites.noSites: No sites. Click “+ Add Site” to get started.
sites.deleteConfirm:
Delete “{name}”? 

This action is irreversible: conversations, leads, tracked links and widget data will be deleted.
sites.crawlConnecting: Connecting to the API to view progress…
sites.crawlFailedDefault: Unable to read site — check URL or try again.
sites.crawlApiCheck: Verify that the Render API responds:
sites.crawlFreePlanHint: Free Plan: the first call may take ~1 min (wake-up).

links.title: Tracked links
links.subtitle: Create links by campaign (Facebook, Instagram, etc.) and track visits.
links.subtitleExtended: Create links for your Facebook, Instagram, Google Ads, etc. campaigns. Add a preview image visible when the link is shared (WhatsApp, Facebook, etc.).
links.previewHint: This image is displayed in WhatsApp, Facebook and Messenger when you share the link /c/{slug}.
links.noSiteYet: First add a site in Sites to create tracked links.
links.emptyTable: No tracked links. Create one above to get your Facebook URL.

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Agent qualified leads.
leads.subtitleExtended: Visitors qualified by the chatbot (score, contact, country) · {count} qualified{plural} (≥ 60)
leads.emptyHint: No leads yet. A lead is created when a visitor is well qualified by the assistant (score ≥ 60).

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: History of exchanges with your visitors.

advisors.title: Advisors
advisors.subtitle: Invite advisors to respond to handoffs from the mobile app.
advisors.inviteSent: Invitation sent by email — the advisor will be able to connect to the mobile app.
advisors.subtitleExtended: Invite as many advisors as necessary to the same site — they receive all handoffs and the first available takes the conversation.
advisors.step1: Create a site per page/brand (Dashboard → Sites)
advisors.step2: Install the widget or share a tracked link (Dashboard → Links)
advisors.step3: Invite one or more advisors to the same site
advisors.step4: Each advisor connects to the mobile app — everyone receives the notification, the first to respond takes the visitor

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Organization, agent and appearance of the widget.
settings.orgNameRequired: The name of the organization is required.
settings.welcomeHint: Leave blank or generic for auto generation from the site (on re-crawl).
settings.defaultWelcome: Good morning ! How can I help you?
settings.orgNameHint: Shown in the dashboard and chat preview below.
settings.noSitesBody: First add a site in Sites to configure the agent, contacts and chat appearance.
settings.quickContactsHint: WhatsApp, Call and Email buttons at the bottom of the chat (clickable icons).
settings.proOnlyHint: Reserved for the Pro Plan. Upgrade to Pro to enable WhatsApp, call and email in the widget.
settings.widgetAppearanceHint: Logo, colors and font displayed in the chat header on your site.

signup.title: Create your AI agent
signup.subtitle: Enter your site URL. The analysis starts automatically.
signup.emailConfirmBody: A confirmation link has been sent to {email}.

forgotPassword.title: Forgotten password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.sendFailed: Unable to send email. Try again later.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for {email}, an email has just been sent. Also check your spam.
forgotPassword.gmailHint: Gmail: also consult the Promotions tab and search for “Supabase” or “Reset password”. Supabase auth emails are sometimes filtered by Gmail.

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.passwordMin: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid or expired link. Request a new reset link.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Redirection to the dashboard...

hero.badge: AI Sales Agent · Embed · Qualified Leads
hero.title: Transform your visitors into
hero.subtitle: {saasName} analyzes your website, deploys an intelligent chatbot on your pages or advertising campaigns, and alerts you when a prospect is ready to buy or register.

preview.title: An assistant who knows
preview.body: No endless manual configuration: our engine reads your product pages, training courses, prices and sessions. Claude writes natural responses in 6 languages ​​(French, English, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, German), with your registration links and contact buttons.
bullets: Greeting message generated after the crawl

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From registration to first qualified lead — follow the journey live.

chatPreview.welcome: Good morning ! I am your company's assistant. What training are you interested in?
chatPreview.userMessage: IRATA rope access technician in Togo, next session?
chatPreview.footer: Live demo — just like on your site

steps.title: Connect your site
steps.desc: Registration + automatic crawl of your pages.

steps.title: Deploy everywhere
steps.desc: Widget ready to paste on your site.

steps.title: Convert
steps.desc: First qualified lead in the dashboard.

signupFlow.scriptHint: Script to paste on your site
signupFlow.footer: Actual route after registration — approximately 5 minutes

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to sell and qualify, without a technical team.

items.title: Lightweight embed widget
items.desc: A script on your site. The chat opens in a bubble or full screen page, without slowing down your pages.

items.title: AI trained on your site
items.desc: Automatic crawling of your pages, training and FAQs. The agent responds with your real pricing and listing links.

items.title: Links tracked by campaign
items.desc: Create a slug by source (Facebook, Instagram, Google Ads, etc.) and track visits and interactions.

items.title: Qualification & scoring
items.desc: Country, budget, availability: each conversation is rated out of 100. Hot leads come up on their own.

items.title: Integrated voice
items.desc: Your visitors can speak into the microphone and listen to responses — ideal for mobile and accessibility.

items.title: Human handoff
items.desc: One-click WhatsApp, call and email buttons. The conversation history remains available.

items.title: Training centers
items.desc: IRATA, CND sessions, dates and prices: the agent offers the right registrations with the exact links.

items.title: E-commerce & services
items.desc: Product answers, FAQ and guidance towards purchase or quote without waiting for an advisor.

items.title: Social ads campaigns
items.desc: One /c/your-slug link per campaign. See where clicks are coming from and what visitors are doing in chat.

dashboardHighlight.title: A dashboard that speaks business
dashboardHighlight.subtitle: KPIs, conversations, leads, country breakdown, tracked link performance and widget interactions — all in one place.

pricing.title: Simple rates
pricing.subtitle: Start small, go Pro when your campaigns take off.

items.a: About 5 minutes: create an account, enter the URL of your site, the crawl and agent training will launch automatically.
Not by design: the agent only relies on the crawled content of your site. If he doesn't know, he offers human contact.

items.q: Can I use it without a developer?
items.a: Yes. Copy the widget script or tracked link from the dashboard. No technical skills required.

items.q: How do I integrate it into my site (WordPress, Next.js, React, etc.)?
items.a: Only one script to paste before </body>. Detailed guides for each framework on the Integration page — viewable even before creating an account.
French, English, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese and German. The agent detects the visitor's language and responds in the same language.

cta.title: Ready to never lose another visitor?
cta.subtitle: Create your account, enter your site URL and let {saasName} do the rest. Test without obligation.

chatLanding.missingKey: Incomplete link: the widget key (?key=...) is missing. Copy the URL from Dashboard → Tracked Links → Copy.
chatLanding.widgetMissing: Widget.js file not found on this site
chatLanding.apiCheck: Verify that the Render API responds:
chatLanding.freePlanHint: Free Plan: the first call may take ~1 min (wake-up).

integration.title: Integration
integration.subtitle: Paste the script on your site — WordPress, Next.js, React, HTML…

deleteAccount.title: Account deletion
deleteAccount.subtitle: Request permanent deletion of your account and data.

setupOrg.title: Finalize your account
setupOrg.subtitle: Your account exists but the organization has not yet been created. Enter your business information to continue.
